scan.title: Scan Network
scan.description: Scan your local network for ONVIF cameras. The integration will automatically use the local subnet. Username and password are optional here, but providing them helps fetch model and serial information during discovery.

data_description.username: Optional camera username used to fetch ONVIF device information
data_description.password: Optional camera password used to fetch ONVIF device information

pick_device.title: Select a Camera
pick_device.description: Choose one of the discovered ONVIF devices.

confirm_device.title: Confirm Camera

manual.title: Manual Entry
manual.description: Enter your ShowMo camera details. The RTSP URL is typically rtsp://IP_ADDRESS/live0_0.sdp for the main stream.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this camera. Defaults to 'Live' if not provided.
data_description.rtsp_url: Full RTSP URL including path, e.g., rtsp://192.168.1.120/live0_0.sdp

data_description.name: A friendly name for this camera. Defaults to 'Live' if not provided.
data_description.rtsp_url: Full RTSP URL including path, e.g., rtsp://192.168.1.120/live0_0.sdp

error.invalid_rtsp_url: Invalid RTSP URL. Must start with rtsp://
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the camera
error.discovery_failed: Camera discovery failed. Check your network and try again
error.invalid_device: The selected device is no longer available. Please rescan
error.cannot_determine_subnet: Could not determine the local subnet automatically
error.no_cameras_found: No ONVIF cameras were found on that subnet
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs and try again

ptz.name: PTZ control
ptz.description: Pan, tilt, zoom, or recall a preset on a ShowMo camera. Fixed-lens models advertise PTZ but answer "not supported"; the call is logged and ignored.

pan.name: Pan
pan.description: Pan velocity for ContinuousMove (-1 left … 1 right).

tilt.name: Tilt
tilt.description: Tilt velocity for ContinuousMove (-1 down … 1 up).

zoom.name: Zoom
zoom.description: Zoom velocity for ContinuousMove (-1 out … 1 in).

preset.name: Preset
preset.description: Preset token to recall when move_mode is GotoPreset.

continuous_duration.name: Continuous duration
continuous_duration.description: Seconds to move before auto-stopping a ContinuousMove (0 = no auto-stop).
